name: housing_services_procurement_shortcut_northpine_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Housing Services, the situation tagged internally around housing services procurement shortcut northpine car fair has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Marco Haddad
agents.identity: I am Marco Haddad, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Housing Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Camila Alvarez, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Housing Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so fairness does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so care does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Marco Haddad must choose under care versus fairness. What does Marco Haddad do?
